allow: Bash(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); b=p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\); print\('chromium ok'\); b.close\(\); p.stop\(\)")

Bash(sed -i 's/page.goto\(URL\)/page.goto\(URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded"\)/; s/page.wait_for_load_state\("networkidle"\)/page.wait_for_timeout\(1200\)/; s/pg.goto\(URL\); pg.wait_for_load_state\("networkidle"\); pg.wait_for_timeout\(400\)/pg.goto\(URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded"\); pg.wait_for_timeout\(1400\)/' shot_flow.py)
